task_completion.description: Navigate to the System Message configuration in JFrog Artifactory
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JFrog Artifactory Administration interface is open, specifically showing the 'System Message' configuration page or settings area.

task_completion.description: Enter the exact scheduled maintenance message
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Scheduled Maintenance: Saturday, Oct 24th at 02:00 UTC. System will be read-only.' is visible inside the system message input text area.

task_completion.description: Set the message severity to Warn (Orange)
task_completion.visual_evidence: The severity dropdown, radio button, or color selector for the system message is set to 'Warning' or 'Warn', often indicated by an orange color or warning icon.
The 'Enable' checkbox or toggle switch associated with the system message is checked or turned to the 'on' position.

task_completion.description: Verify the system message is visible across the platform
task_completion.visual_evidence: A global banner (typically orange) displaying the scheduled maintenance message is visible at the top of the JFrog Artifactory UI, indicating it is actively broadcasting.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser to configure the message
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser navigating to http://localhost:8082, rather than using terminal commands like curl to hit the Artifactory REST API.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual JFrog Artifactory application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the genuine JFrog Artifactory dashboard and administration menus, not a text editor or a mock HTML file.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the banner
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element) are not open and being used to manually inject the banner HTML into the page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected system message is exactly 'Scheduled Maintenance: Saturday, Oct 24th at 02:00 UTC. System will be read-only.'. The severity must be set to 'warn' (Orange) and the message must be enabled.
